news.summary: Calgary, Alberta, on May 9, 2025 – Today, High Tide Inc. revealed its latest update. The company, trading on NASDAQ as HITI, on TSXV as HITI, and on FSE as 2LYA, is a retail-focused corporation in the cannabis industry. High Tide introduced its Canna Cabana retail division, emphasizing its commitment to providing tangible benefits throughout the cannabis sector.
news.headline: High Tide Inc. opens new Canna Cabana store in Cornwall,  Ontario. (NASDAQ: HITI) (TSXV: HITI) (FSE: 2LYA)

news.summary: More than 200 beloved items from the iconic classic series will be up for online auction from May 12 to 28, 2025. The proceeds from this auction will go towards supporting the National Autistic Society. This event coincides with the 80th anniversary of Thomas & Friends. Los Angeles is set to host this auction and it is expected to garner significant interest from fans and collectors.
news.headline: Over 200 original Thomas & Friends models to be auctioned online between May 12-28, 2025. Proceeds benefit National Autistic Society.

news.summary: On May 9, 2025, in DELRAY BEACH, Florida, a report on the Syntactic Foam Market was released. The report focuses on various aspects such as Product Type, Matrix Type, Filler Type, Foam type, Chemistry, and End-use applications. The market is segmented based on Product Type into Macro-sphere and Micro-sphere, Matrix Type includes Metal, Polymer, and Ceramic, while Filler Type consists of Glass and Ceramic Micro-spheres. The Foam is categorized into Block, Sheet & Rod, and Chemistry options are Epoxy and Polypropylene. This market report indicates a comprehensive analysis of the sector and is essential for understanding the dynamics of the Syntactic Foam industry.
news.headline: Syntactic foam market valued at $233,929.5 thousand by 2030 - MarketsandMarkets™ report.

news.summary: Autodesk has announced its brand evolution with the launch of the Let There Be Anything global campaign alongside a refreshed identity. This transformation marks one of the most significant changes in the company's 43-year history. As part of this evolution, a U.S.-only ad featuring Tony Hale will be aired during the NBA Playoffs. The announcement was made in San Francisco on May 9, 2025.
news.headline: Autodesk announces brand refresh with Let There Be Anything campaign, new identity, and Tony Hale ad during NBA Playoffs.

news.summary: QwikLife's infused-product marketplace, C.R.E.A.M. seltzers, have gained industry recognition for their distinctive flavors and innovative branding in Chicago on May 9, 2025. The debut product line received notable attention at the 2025 event, showcasing the company's commitment to bold and unique offerings.
news.headline: QwikLife's C.R.E.A.M. seltzers win Best Infused Seltzer at 2025 L.A. High Spirits Awards, showcasing bold flavors.

news.summary: On May 9, 2025, in Hsinchu, ChipMOS TECHNOLOGIES INC. (stock symbols: Taiwan Stock Exchange: 8150, Nasdaq: IMOS), a top provider of outsourced semiconductor assembly and test services, announced its latest financial results. The report consisted of unaudited consolidated data.
news.headline: ChipMOS reported April 2025 revenue. Taiwan Stock Exchange: 8150, Nasdaq: IMOS. Leader in outsourced semiconductor services.

news.summary: Today, in Shanghai on May 9, 2025, Minghui Pharmaceutical, a biopharmaceutical company in the late stages of clinical trials, revealed an exclusive partnership with Qilu Pharmaceutical. This agreement entails the development, production, and distribution of its products.
news.headline: Minghui Pharma partners with Qilu Pharma for B7-H3 ADC in China. Exclusive collab details include development, manufacturing, and commercialization agreement.

news.summary: Over 21,000 individuals are set to receive their degrees from Arizona State University, with a notable 3,000+ among them being international students. This event is scheduled to take place in Tempe, Arizona on May 12, 2025. Against the backdrop of growing worries about the perceived elitism and exclusivity of higher education institutions, ASU stands out as a beacon of inclusivity and accessibility.
news.headline: ASU set to graduate largest class ever with over 21,000 students, including 3,000+ international students.

news.summary: U.S. stock futures fluctuated on Friday after three consecutive days of gains. A bilateral trade deal between the U.S. and U.K. was sealed, involving a significant reduction in tariffs on UK-made cars by the U.S. and the elimination of tariffs on American-made cars by the U.K. The 10-year Treasury bond yielded 4.37%, and the two-year bond was at 3.86%. Markets are projecting an 82.9% likelihood of the Federal Reserve keeping interest rates unchanged in June. The Dow Jones fell by 0.15%, while the S&P 500, Nasdaq 100, and Russell 2000 saw slight gains. The SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust was up 0.004% to $565.08, and the Invesco QQQ Trust ETF advanced 0.17% to $489.10 in premarket trading. Industrials, consumer discretionary, and energy sectors led a market rally on Thursday. U.S. initial jobless claims saw a decline to 228,000 for the week, and U.S. labor productivity in the nonfarm business sector decreased by 0.8%. U.S. Foods Holding Corp. reported below-expectation Q1 earnings, while Sezzle Inc. shares rose by 42% on better-than-anticipated results and an upward FY25 guidance revision.
news.headline: US stock futures fluctuate after strong 3-day run, sealed US-UK trade deal cuts car tariffs. Futures: Dow -0.15%, S&P 0.07%, Nasdaq 0.17%, Russell -0.23%. Market projects 82.9% Fed to keep rates. Dow boosted by US-UK trade deal; US Foods Q1 earnings missed, Sezzle up 42%. Initial jobless claims at 228,000, labor productivity down 0.8%. Bond yields: 10-year 4.37%, 2-year 3.86%.

news.summary: Ivanka Trump, daughter of President Donald Trump, recently introduced her latest project, Planet Harvest. The company, founded in 2023 and based in Chicago, focuses on improving access to fresh produce and addressing supply chain inefficiencies. Trump publicly discussed her involvement in Planet Harvest for the first time at the Heartland Summit in Bentonville, Arkansas, marking her significant public appearance since her father's return to the White House. In an interview with Axios, she shared the company's mission to transform how American produce is distributed, emphasizing community engagement. Planet Harvest aims to connect surplus crops with... (Continue reading on Benzinga.com)
news.headline: Ivanka Trump launches Planet Harvest to improve fresh produce access, supply chain; amid White House budget cuts for local food programs.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the number of COVID-19 cases in the country has continued to rise, with over 10,000 new infections recorded in the last 24 hours. The total number of active cases nationwide now stands at nearly 150,000. Hospitals are struggling to cope with the surge in patients, with ICU beds reaching full capacity in many regions. The death toll has also increased, with over 200 fatalities reported in the same period. Health officials are urging the public to follow safety guidelines and get vaccinated to help curb the spread of the virus.
news.headline: IAG buys 71 big jets from Boeing, Airbus to expand its network.
